critic_notes: CON.2 Datenschutz: 3 questions on SDM intro (001, 003) and CON.2.A1 (002). Quotes match after dehyphenation; quote 003 needs the most aggressive normalization because `IT-Grundschutzes` renders in source with an ambiguous `-\n` break. Questions 001 and 003 are chapter-intro content with `baustein_id: null` (info-severity schema note). Quote for 001 is located in the buffer zone (manifest boundary drift). Correct answers well-supported; distractors (BDSG-only, >500-employees threshold, behörden-only) are clearly wrong.

issues.detail: Fragment `Die Konferenz der unabhängigen Datenschutzaufsichtsbehörden des Bundes und der Länder (kur...` matches source near manifest boundary (within 30k-char buffer); manifest char_start/char_end drift.

Chapter-intro/overview question has null baustein_id and null anforderung_type. Semantically acceptable (content is chapter introduction, not a specific requirement) but violates strict kompendium schema.

Fragment `Das SDM nimmt bei der Auswahl geeigneter technischer und organisatorischer Maßnahmen die P...` matches source only under aggressive normalization (ignoring hyphens). PDF extracts compound words like `Content-Security-Policy` as `Content-Security-\nPolicy`; hyphen-newline is ambiguous between word-break and compound-hyphen.

Chapter-intro/overview question has null baustein_id and null anforderung_type. Semantically acceptable (content is chapter introduction, not a specific requirement) but violates strict kompendium schema.
